prompt: For a facilities inventory, identify the organization responsible for the Breakwater Weather Gallery in Stonehaven, then verify the public opening years of its East Wing and West Wing from fetched primary records. Search for the two wing records independently after resolving the organization. In the final answer, list the full wing names alphabetically and omit a wing if no primary record can be retrieved.
